data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Design reduces decision-making time for users navigating the site.
data.technical_spec: Minimalist layout with a low number of choices on each page.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Large CTAs ensure that frequently used elements are easy to click.
data.technical_spec: Button size and spacing optimized for touch interfaces.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Grouping related items together to improve readability.
data.technical_spec: Use of whitespace to create visual hierarchy.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Visual elements organized to be perceived as part of a whole.
data.technical_spec: Typography and color schemes create brand cohesion.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Design leverages familiar patterns to meet user expectations.
data.technical_spec: Conventional navigation panels and footer links.
